paper_metadata.title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion
paper_metadata.abstract: Language models (LMs) have recently been shown to generate more factual responses by employing modularity (Zhou et al., 2021) in combination with retrieval (Adolphs et al., 2021). We extend the recent approach of Adolphs et al. (2021) to include internet search as a module. Our SeeKeR (Search engine->Knowledge->Response) method thus applies a single LM to three modular tasks in succession: search, generating knowledge, and generating a final response. We show that, when using SeeKeR as a dialogue model, it outperforms the state-of-the-art model BlenderBot 2 (Chen et al., 2021) on open-domain knowledge-grounded conversations for the same number of parameters, in terms of consistency, knowledge and per-turn engagingness. SeeKeR applied to topical prompt completions as a standard language model outperforms GPT2 (Radford et al., 2019) and GPT3 (Brown et al., 2020) in terms of factuality and topicality, despite GPT3 being a vastly larger model. Our code and models are made publicly available.

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR introduces a modular architecture that combines a search module with a generative response module, enabling language models to retrieve relevant knowledge and generate contextually appropriate responses. The model uses a dual-path mechanism where knowledge is retrieved from external sources (e.g., Bing search or gold documents) and integrated into the response generation process.
extraction_data.extension: The model uses a single transformer architecture iteratively across three modules—search, knowledge generation, and response generation—where the output of each module is passed as input to the next, along with the original context, enabling modular, sequential reasoning.
extraction_data.research_problem: Factual accuracy, topicality, and up-to-date knowledge in language models
extraction_data.application: Open-domain dialogue, conversational AI, knowledge retrieval, prompt completion
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR Large (GPT2) extends the modular framework to a larger GPT2-based model, improving performance in knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion tasks.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: 128 V100 GPUs for 25 days (no specific corpus mentioned)
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, factually accurate language generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion with factual consistency
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Simultaneous fine-tuning on search, knowledge, and dialogue response tasks
extraction_data.extension: Fine-tuned on GPT2 base model with modular search and knowledge generation components.
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR XL (GPT2) leverages a larger GPT2-based architecture with modular search and knowledge generation, achieving strong performance in knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: 128 V100 GPUs for 25 days (no specific corpus mentioned)
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, factually accurate language generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion with factual consistency
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Simultaneous fine-tuning on search, knowledge, and dialogue response tasks
extraction_data.extension: Fine-tuned on GPT2 base model with modular search and knowledge generation components.
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR introduces a modular architecture with separate transformer modules for search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation, enabling language models to dynamically integrate external knowledge during generation. This modular design improves factual accuracy and topical relevance compared to monolithic models.
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, knowledge-augmented generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Factual accuracy in language generation, knowledge integration in dialogue systems
extraction_data.extension: The model uses three independently trained BART-based modules (search, knowledge, response) with a total of 3×345M parameters, enabling specialized task performance and improved factual consistency.
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR introduces a modular architecture with separate transformer modules for search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation, enabling language models to dynamically integrate external knowledge during generation. This modular design improves factual accuracy and topical relevance compared to monolithic models.
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, knowledge-augmented generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Factual accuracy in language generation, knowledge integration in dialogue systems
extraction_data.extension: The model uses three independently trained BART-based modules (search, knowledge, response) with a total of 3×762M parameters, enabling specialized task performance and improved factual consistency.
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR introduces a modular architecture with separate transformer modules for search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation, enabling language models to dynamically integrate external knowledge during generation. This modular design improves factual accuracy and topical relevance compared to monolithic models.
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, knowledge-augmented generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Factual accuracy in language generation, knowledge integration in dialogue systems
extraction_data.extension: The model uses three independently trained BART-based modules (search, knowledge, response) with a total of 3×1.5B parameters, enabling specialized task performance and improved factual consistency.
extraction_data.paper_title: Language Models that Seek for Knowledge: Modular Search & Generation for Dialogue and Prompt Completion

extraction_data.innovation: SeeKeR introduces a modular framework that integrates search, knowledge retrieval, and response generation in a unified Transformer-based encoder-decoder architecture, enabling factually grounded dialogue and prompt completion.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: 128 V100 GPUs for 25 days (no specific corpus mentioned)
extraction_data.application: Dialogue systems, prompt completion, factually accurate language generation
extraction_data.research_problem: Knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion with factual consistency
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Simultaneous fine-tuning on search, knowledge, and dialogue response tasks
extraction_data.extension: Modular architecture with separate search, knowledge, and dialogue generation modules enables knowledge-grounded dialogue and prompt completion.
